narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township V (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,018 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
